ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the study was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the study */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal the study was published in */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design of the study */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the study */,
  "study_population" TEXT /* Population of the study */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Date the study was added to the database */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* A brief summary of the study */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the study */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the study */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* An assessment of the data quality */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, withdrawn) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the study was conducted */,
  "conflict_of_interest" TEXT /* Any conflicts of interest related to the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number for the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study design */,
  "advantages" TEXT /* Advantages of the study design */,
  "limitations" TEXT /* Limitations of the study design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severe_data" (
  "severe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severe data point */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the severe data belongs to */,
  "severe" TEXT /* Severe data value */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the severe data */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the severe data */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the severe data */,
  "significant" TEXT /* Significance of the severe data */,
  "adjusted" TEXT /* Adjusted value of the severe data */,
  "calculated" TEXT /* Calculated value of the severe data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the severe data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the severe data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the severe data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_severe_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatality_data" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality data point */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the fatality data belongs to */,
  "fatality" TEXT /* Fatality data value */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the fatality data */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the fatality data */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the fatality data */,
  "significant" TEXT /* Significance of the fatality data */,
  "adjusted" TEXT /* Adjusted value of the fatality data */,
  "calculated" TEXT /* Calculated value of the fatality data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the fatality data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the fatality data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the fatality data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatality_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multivariate_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the adjustment belongs to */,
  "adjustment" TEXT /* Adjustment value */,
  "adjustment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the multivariate adjustment */,
  "adjustment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multivariate_adjustments_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the study */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the population belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population description */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the study population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the study population */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the study population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_populations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the design belongs to */,
  "design" TEXT /* Design description */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study design */,
  "advantages" TEXT /* Advantages of the study design */,
  "limitations" TEXT /* Limitations of the study design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_designs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "covid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 data point */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the COVID-19 data belongs to */,
  "covid_data" TEXT /* COVID-19 data value */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the COVID-19 data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the COVID-19 data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the COVID-19 data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
